name: sffmc
author: SFFMC Contributors
description: OpenCode plugins: 3 composite packages (safety/memory/agentic) + 10 standalone sub-features

scripts.build: for p in packages/*/src/index.ts; do bun build --target=bun --outdir=/tmp/sffmc-build "$p"; done && bun build --target=bun --outdir=/tmp/sffmc-build shared/src/index.ts
scripts.test:all: for p in packages/* shared; do (cd "$p" && bun test) || exit 1; done
scripts.typecheck: for p in packages/* shared; do (cd "$p" && bun build --target=bun --no-bundle src/index.ts 2>&1) | grep -v 'bun build' || true; done
scripts.precommit: bun run typecheck && bun run test && python3 scripts/audit-load-order.py && bun run audit:public && bun run scripts/run-health.ts
scripts.publish:packages: for p in packages/*/package.json; do d=$(dirname "$p"); (cd "$d" && bun publish --dry-run) || exit 1; done
scripts.version:list: for p in packages/*/package.json shared/package.json; do echo -n "$p: "; jq -r .version "$p"; done
